textByHash.17b1db5d96ff7a9883300f1044375997b1065c28: Fine. I declare you trustworthy, if you consider bribing a seer a trustworthy transaction.
textByHash.193d839c6d3ed14cb3d20b303effcbb147614df5: You got me all excited about evil plots, and now it's just a matter of trust. I really can't be bothered to strain myself on that account.
textByHash.20bbfcae02f7f580fc0107957cf8e92d4a4f9dcd: Are you another one of those 'holier than thou' fools wanting to redeem themselves?
textByHash.239edf60fa767af2257abcf7c50c80ac3de63ca3: Whatcha lookin' at chicken legs? Don't you have a General you should speak to?
textByHash.2c4f13f6394792eaa9dc80e311c89b0c6e1d45d5: Oh, there's money in it. I just don't get invited to many parties.
textByHash.34fbd4184aaf1185e0cce40702af6c40fdfa96a7: Augh! Your sins! They BLIND me!
textByHash.3779aed3c4e857b4a20d3a0290c88439263f0e59: It was fun messing with those devotees the first few times but, after a while, condemning people to an eternity of damnation gets a bit dull.
textByHash.49720736a25e4156dc70b19dc2094fc48d3199db: Here ya go. Take more care of it this time.
textByHash.571b57563b9e0e7b0006c20b7a686fdd9b8b7df1: You have done many great deeds...but many terrible deeds. Sometimes you do them by accident, but are still sins. No, I would not trust you to walk my dog.
textByHash.6481afe79d624c1ee8a841130fa79d9489b83ac3: Give this note to Khazard, it will prove you have been to see me.
textByHash.7c50bf071364406fbb3d9b8fc0204ee792c761b2: Ooooh, you're going to learn of his plans and stab him in the back?
textByHash.7ea362cdcb3d057a634b2396b0abbc24e89845c5: Oh, that old fart? Is he still around? Humph. I dunno if I can be bothered.
textByHash.84c390e1fc25baa3c830c83b9ad7de8805fa782d: You already have one. Get on with you!
textByHash.ab96ffbd1168a2a74d79b352e43b1d463ca945c6: So, whom are you trying to hook up with? Dark priest? Warlord? Penguin?
textByHash.c71895479516e56642d248be443ea350e0c3ea7a: Fine, give me 40 gold coins and I'll take a look at your sins.
textByHash.e5dd4d1f894d14af83fbe548c933f6f7158bd414: He'll know it's a lie. But I do need the cash, so I'll do it. Gimme 40 gold coins and you'll be as trustworthy as a newborn.
textByHash.ee12d17e3b2fa85beb2c160662fe005805e6e892: Sorry, you don't have enough money.
